---
title: "Decision Records (ADRs)"
subtitle: "Architecture and governance decisions — append-only"
---

Architecture Decision Records capture significant, hard-to-reverse choices and *why* they were made.
They are **append-only**: a superseded decision is marked as such and replaced by a new record, never
edited away. This gives the project a durable memory of its own reasoning.

## Records

| ADR | Title | Status |
|---|---|---|
| [ADR-0001](ADR-0001-project-architecture.md) | Project architecture | Accepted |
| [ADR-0002](ADR-0002-cis-as-governance-model.md) | CIS as governance model; PDF as hypothesis source | Accepted |

## Adding a record

1. Copy an existing ADR to `ADR-XXXX-<slug>.md` (next number).
2. Use the standard headings: **Status, Context, Decision, Consequences, Alternatives considered**.
3. Link it in the table above.
4. To change a past decision, add a new ADR that **supersedes** it and update the old one's Status.

See the [README](../../README.md) and the
[Governance section of the CIS](../../cis/commercial-intelligence-specification.md) for the full
process.
